name: stripe-create-subscription
description: Create a recurring subscription for a Stripe customer against a price/plan. Supports trial periods, payment behavior control (for 3D Secure flows), and metadata. Use after stripe-create-customer to start a billing relationship. The returned subscription_id and client_secret (when payment_behavior=default_incomplete) can be passed to a frontend for payment confirmation.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Stripe secret key.

PRICE_ID.description: Stripe price ID (price_xxx or plan_xxx). Supports {{price_id}} interpolation.

QUANTITY.description: Quantity of the price to subscribe to (default: 1).

TRIAL_PERIOD_DAYS.description: Number of trial days before billing starts. Mutually exclusive with TRIAL_END.

TRIAL_END.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when trial ends. Overrides TRIAL_PERIOD_DAYS if both set. Supports {{trial_end}} interpolation.

PAYMENT_BEHAVIOR.description: Payment behavior: 'default_incomplete' (requires frontend confirmation, recommended for 3DS), 'error_if_incomplete' (fail fast), 'allow_incomplete' (create even if payment fails).

CANCEL_AT_PERIOD_END.description: If true, subscription cancels at end of current billing period rather than immediately renewing.

setup_instructions.title: Create a price in Stripe Dashboard
setup_instructions.detail: Go to Products in your Stripe Dashboard, create a product and price (e.g. '$29/month'). Copy the price ID (price_xxx) into PRICE_ID.

setup_instructions.title: Typical workflow pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [stripe-create-customer] → [stripe-create-subscription: CUSTOMER_ID={{customer_id}}, PRICE_ID=price_xxx] → [condition: status == 'active' or status == 'incomplete'] → downstream actions.

setup_instructions.title: 3D Secure (3DS) flow
setup_instructions.detail: Set PAYMENT_BEHAVIOR=default_incomplete. The subscription will be created with status='incomplete' and the output includes a client_secret. Pass this to your frontend's Stripe.js to confirm payment and complete 3DS authentication.
